name: web-autopilot
description: Figma-to-production web service automation pipeline. Transforms Figma designs into complete fullstack applications (Next.js + FastAPI + PostgreSQL) through 6 phases: design analysis, requirements, architecture, implementation, QA, and completion.

skills.name: web-autopilot
skills.description: Full pipeline: Figma to production web service (all 6 phases)

skills.name: design-analysis
skills.description: Phase 1: Analyze Figma designs and extract components, tokens, flows

skills.name: requirements
skills.description: Phase 2: Interactive spec-writer agent - consultant-grade PRD, API spec, DB schema, tech stack through 7-stage dialogue

skills.name: architecture
skills.description: Phase 3: Design system architecture and tech stack

skills.name: implementation
skills.description: Phase 4: Generate working Next.js + FastAPI code

skills.name: qa
skills.description: Phase 5: Testing, linting, type-checking with ralph-loop

skills.name: completion
skills.description: Phase 6: Final verification and deployment readiness
